title: Senior ML Engineer
description: Looking for a Senior ML Engineer with strong Python, PyTorch, and LangChain skills. You will build LLM pipelines and RAG systems using PostgreSQL and Docker.

title: Junior Data Scientist
description: Entry level position for a Data Scientist. Python and scikit-learn required. TensorFlow a plus. Work on classification and clustering problems.

title: ML Engineer
description: ML Engineer needed to fine-tune transformer models using PyTorch and Huggingface. LLM experience required. FastAPI for serving models.

title: Lead AI Engineer
description: Lead AI Engineer to head our LLM team. LangChain, OpenAI, RAG, and vector databases like Pinecone and ChromaDB. Strong Python and AWS required.

title: Senior Data Scientist
description: Senior Data Scientist for time-series forecasting and NLP projects. Python, scikit-learn, PyTorch, and MLflow. Experience with Airflow pipelines.

title: MLOps Engineer
description: MLOps Engineer to build and maintain ML infrastructure. Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, MLflow, Airflow. Python scripting for automation.

title: Junior ML Engineer
description: Junior ML Engineer for our growing team. Familiarity with Python, scikit-learn, and basic neural networks with PyTorch. Entry level, mentorship provided.

title: NLP Engineer
description: NLP Engineer with deep knowledge of transformers, BERT, GPT models. Python, Huggingface, LangChain, and RAG pipeline experience required. PostgreSQL for data storage.

title: Sr. AI Researcher
description: Sr. AI Researcher for reinforcement learning and LLM alignment work. PyTorch, Python, and published research preferred. Fine-tuning experience essential.

title: Computer Vision Engineer
description: Computer vision engineer using PyTorch, OpenCV, and TensorFlow. Build image classification and object detection models. Docker and Kubernetes for deployment.

title: Data Engineer
description: Data Engineer to build ETL pipelines with Python, Spark, Kafka, and Airflow. PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis. AWS infrastructure.

title: AI Product Engineer
description: Build AI-powered product features using LangChain, OpenAI, and RAG. Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL. Experience with LLM APIs required.

title: Principal ML Engineer
description: Principal ML Engineer to lead distributed training infrastructure. PyTorch, Kubernetes, AWS, MLflow. Strong Python and research background.

title: ML Engineer - LLMs
description: ML Engineer focused on LLM fine-tuning using LoRA and QLoRA techniques. Python, PyTorch, Huggingface transformers. LangChain for orchestration.

title: Graduate AI Engineer
description: Entry level position for recent graduates. Python basics, some scikit-learn and TensorFlow knowledge. We will train you on LLMs and NLP.

title: Senior MLOps Engineer
description: Senior MLOps engineer to design ML platform. Docker, Kubernetes, GCP, MLflow. Python automation scripts. CI/CD for ML pipelines.

title: AI Automation Engineer
description: Build AI automation workflows with LangChain, Python, and FastAPI. RAG pipelines, vector databases including ChromaDB and Pinecone. Playwright for web automation.

title: Staff ML Engineer
description: Staff ML engineer for recommendation systems. Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow, Spark, Kafka. Distributed training on GCP and AWS. 7+ years experience.

title: ML Engineer - Computer Vision
description: ML engineer for computer vision in robotics. Python, PyTorch, OpenCV. Docker, Kubernetes for deployment. Real-time inference optimization.

title: Junior NLP Engineer
description: Junior NLP engineer for text classification and sentiment analysis. Python, scikit-learn, and BERT basics. Entry level, 0-1 years experience acceptable.
